trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close below $0.15 resistance after touching it, or failed breakout above $0.15
confluence_signals: Price rising with LOW volume (weak buying) - bearish divergence
Perp premium (mark vs index) at 96th percentile, indicating significant discount (bearish)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Four bearish signals (resistance, price-volume divergence, negative funding, high perp discount) align for a short, estimating a 62-70% win rate.
